_meta.description: Canonical schema that every module in AI5R must conform to before it can be registered in registry.json. This is the contract for 'Everything is a Module'.

rules: Once assigned, ID never changes — version handles evolution

id.description: Globally unique identifier following id_format pattern

owner.description: Who owns this module — AI5R or a sub-system ID

layer.description: Position in the Component → Engine → Factory → Product → Company hierarchy

optional_fields.factory: Parent factory ID if this is an engine or component
optional_fields.input_contract: ID or schema reference for accepted input
optional_fields.output_contract: ID or schema reference for produced output
optional_fields.dependencies: Array of module IDs this module depends on
optional_fields.dependents: Array of module IDs that depend on this module
optional_fields.sprint_introduced: Sprint number where this module was first built
optional_fields.source: Path or URL to source file/workflow

registration_rules: A module must have all required_fields filled before it can be added to registry.json
A module with status PLANNED may be pre-registered but cannot be added to runtime.json
ID is immutable after first registration — change requires deprecating old ID and registering new one
Version increment is mandatory for any change to input_contract or output_contract
Deprecated modules stay in registry with status=DEPRECATED — they are never deleted
Every module in registry.json must have a corresponding entry in dependency_graph.json
